title: Boat Rental in Business Marbella: Guide, Prices and Top Tips for 2026
html:
Business Marbella, a prestigious hub on the Costa del Sol, offers direct access to the Mediterranean from Puerto Banú s marina. Renting a motor yacht or catamaran here starts from around 450 EUR for a half-day trip. BoatHire24 connects you with verified local operators to explore this glamorous coastline.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Business Marbella?

Prices range from 80 EUR for a shared tour to 3,000 EUR for a crewed luxury yacht per day. The cost depends on boat size, duration, and extras like water toys. You can browse options and find a skippered charter on BoatHire24 to compare prices and availability.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Business Marbella?

No, you can rent many boats without a licence if you hire a skipper. For self-drive boats under 6 metres, a Spanish recreational licence is required, but the operator confirms exact requirements. Most visitors opt for a skippered charter for safety and local knowledge.

Where to set off in Business Marbella

Your departure point depends on the boat type and itinerary. Puerto Banús, a world-famous marina with designer boutiques, is the most glamorous start. Nearby, the Real Club Náutico de Marbella offers more traditional facilities. Cala de Mijas provides a quieter launch spot to the west, while Cabopino Port, near the dunes of Artola, is ideal for nature lovers. For day trips, head to the scenic anchorage of Playa de la Fontanilla or the exclusive bay of Marbella Club Hotel. The protected area of the Cabo de Gata-Jávea is further afield but accessible for longer charters.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor Yacht (Fairline 45): Ideal for couples or small groups wanting speed and style. Fits up to 10 guests. From 850 EUR half-day. See details on this motor yacht on BoatHire24.
  2. Catamaran (Lagoon 46): Perfect for families, offering stability and space. For up to 12 guests. From 1,200 EUR full-day.
  3. Skipper-led Rib: Great for thrill-seekers to explore hidden coves. Up to 8 guests. From 400 EUR for 2 hours.
  4. Luxury Sunseeker Predator: For VIP experiences with crew. Fits 12 guests over 8 hours. From 2,500 EUR.

Cost breakdown for boat rental in Business Marbella

  • Shared tour: from 80 EUR per person for 2 hours.
  • Small motorboat half-day: from 450 EUR, no skipper required with licence.
  • Catamaran full-day: from 1,200 EUR, includes crew and fuel for 8 hours.
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day: from 2,500 EUR, with gourmet catering and water sports equipment.

Season and local tips

The high season runs from June to September, when the Poniente wind moderates temperatures. Book at least two weeks ahead for peak availability.

For the calmest waters, go early morning before the afternoon Levante breeze picks up, making the sea choppier around the Cabo de Gata area.
Spring and autumn offer milder weather and fewer crowds, with lower prices on BoatHire24.

At a glance

  • Price band: 80 EUR, 3,000 EUR per person or vessel
  • Peak months: June to September inclusive
  • Typical trip length: 2 hours to full day (8 hours)
  • Standard guest capacity: 6 to 12 guests per boat
  • Currency: EUR
  • Licence required: Only for self-drive under 6m; skippered charters need none

Questions about boat rental in Business Marbella

Can I rent a boat in Business Marbella without a skipper?

Yes, for boats under 6 metres you can rent self-drive if you hold a valid Spanish or International Certificate of Competence.

What is the typical duration for a half-day charter in Marbella?

A half-day charter usually lasts 4 hours, leaving at 10 am or 2 pm from Puerto Banús or Marbella port.

Are meals included in the charter price?

Most skippered charters include soft drinks and a tapas lunch; confirm with the operator as luxury yachts often offer full catering.

What are the best anchorages near Business Marbella?

Popular anchorages include Cabopino Bay, Playa de la Venus, and the secluded Cala del Granadillo, all within 5 nautical miles of Puerto Banús.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Business Marbella or list your own. To plan your trip, browse the listings on BoatHire24 for verified options. If you own a boat, you can also become a host and earn income from your vessel.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Business Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
